title: lastrea calcarata
intro: Lastrea calcarata, also known as the calcarated lady fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lastrea calcarata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. The herbal preparations of Lastrea calcarata typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the plant's leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
